scores.notes: Severe OCR errors throughout with garbled text, incorrect character recognition, and poor structure preservation. Company name heavily corrupted ('Xr 0.[' instead of 'MR D.I.Y.'), address fragmented with spacing issues, and date incorrect (11-01-19 vs 12-01-19). Only the total amount 33.90 was captured correctly. Text is largely unreadable with random characters and broken formatting.
